notes: Recovery pass. Surfaced 3 closures from morning pass: PR #125 (#120 finalize() rejection trap), PR #126 (#121 tutorial-hand wiring broke game), PR #127 stacked collateral. Six anti-regression traps all absent. Tutorial-hand left CLOSED (121/122) - refiling would be saga-fuel; will reassess after #129 reveals mobile root cause. Sprint-3 PR-B shipped as PR #111: 4 issues — #33 reconnect grace window, #34 host migration, #50 in-game chat + profanity filter, #51 local game history (localStorage per CLAUDE.md no-backend rule). 6 commits. Node sim 159→206 (+47 cases). Subagent falsely reported 2 regressions as pre-existing; I verified on baseline b122777 and confirmed they were NEW regressions introduced by the grace-window wiring interpreting Supabase retrack phantom leave events as real disconnects. Root cause: presence:leave fires on every channel.track() call. Fix committed as 17b6a26 — filter leaves matching local player id. All previously-green tests restored. Only remaining failure is multi-client flake (different symptom: vote tie loop instead of host-gone), not a PR-B issue. 16 passed / 1 skipped / 1 failed.

Outcome-based roadmap v1 declared. North star: ship real-world working products with correct monetization/distribution/compliance. F-series factory milestones (F1 one game shipped, F2 multi on cycle, F3 weekly cadence, F4 5/week portfolio) and G-series per-game (G1 foundation through G5 cadence on autopilot) defined in council/ROADMAP.md and council/MILESTONE. Milestone gate added to CLAUDE.md Step 2 — future-milestone issues invisible until current closes. Self-improvement debt clause: milestone complete only when outcome holds AND lessons encoded in brain. Council may re-shape milestones (never north star) if regression demands. All 3 games under F1 in parallel; Bloxplode under retroactive-harmonization constraint (no major refactor). 25 factory-improvement issues retagged into F-buckets; council #1 (cron auth) and #3 (runs.jsonl) closed as completed. F4 work (federated MCP, multi-harness, genre packs) now forbidden until F1 closes.

notes: Streamline pass after roadmap v1 declaration. Killed all 4 deprecated stratos crons (1584-line build.log of auth failures stopped). Closed 4 obsolete house-mafia sprint milestones (duplicate scheme problem that tripped up active session). Tightened CLAUDE.md tag-on-touch from permissive to mandatory and added F/G quick reference. Closed 6 stale issues across all repos. Tagged 13 in-flight issues that builders had touched without milestone metadata. Every open issue now sits under a milestone or is a swarm-state note. CLAUDE.md grew 17 lines (685 total).

Start arrow session after roadmap v1 / F1 declared. Pending build-request queue was 0; 4 PRs from prior passes (#123/#124/#130/#131) green but no Ripon comments yet so no mobile error paste to work from. Executed autonomous diagnosis instead: spawned Playwright subagent at iPhone 13 profile against production + PR #130 + PR #131 previews + production-desktop control. Reproduced the bug in fresh Chromium and proved it is NOT mobile-specific — its a localStorage artifact (Ripons desktop has tutorial_complete=true, skipping the tutorial). Root cause isolated to arrow-drawer.js line 25 early-return on segs.length < 2, which silently drops every 1-cell tutorial arrow while proc-gen levels (minLen>=2) paint fine. Filed #133 with full diagnostic + pixel-probe evidence, built fix as PR #134: three-way branch in drawArrow, standalone arrowhead via existing drawHead helper, new Playwright regression test in tests/e2e/smoke.spec.js that counts arrow-body-colored pixels and asserts >=400. Red-then-green verified locally by subagent (revert drawer -> 0px -> FAIL, restore -> 1200px -> PASS). Commented on #132 to mark F1 checkbox 1 complete pending merge. Also flagged that PR #126 (tutorial-hand structure, closed) may have been incorrectly attributed — the no-arrows-render symptom matches this drawer bug exactly. Did NOT refile tutorial-hand (saga guardrail per autonomous-default memory). Diagnostic artifacts at /tmp/arrow-mobile-diag/.

Also added thin-data quality note to Step 9 council so future councils know not to invent statistical patterns from ~15 runs.jsonl rows. Closed #36/#37/#38 (already built in cbca466). Sprint-3c hotfix opened as DRAFT PR #117. Real party test revealed 3 critical bugs (#113 discussion timer stuck, #114 host-role investigate confused with migration, #115 vote glitch+recursive audio). Subagent root-caused all three as one shared cascade: Supabase presence retrack fires leave for OLD state → my prior 17b6a26 fix only filtered self-leaves so peers were unprotected → grace window fires 30s later → selectNextHost runs non-deterministically per client (joinedAt differs) → wrong peer flips isHost → closure-captured listeners enter host branch → self-echo loop → vote mount stampede + audio recursion. Fix: presence:leave now reads channel.presenceState() and ignores leaves where the key is still in state (retrack artifact). Also fixed latent isHost-stripping in gameState projections. 3 of 4 peers now reach day-discuss cleanly in the hardened test. 1 remaining bug (#116): dead Host-role investigator stays stuck on night screen, never routes to spectator. Draft PR opened — Sahil decides whether to merge partial fix or continue iterating. Hardened multi-client test with mount counters is the permanent regression gate going forward. Test state: 19 passed / 1 skipped / 1 failed (the 1 failure is #116, catches the remaining bug deterministically).
